indicators.description: Identifies that focus endpoints bypass auth and rate-limit middleware
Explains root cause: focus handlers registered on engine root, not the api group with middleware
Suggests registering focus handlers on the api group
Does not approve the implementation as-is
Identifies that the dashboard grid consumes this endpoint and will receive far more results
Explains the volume mismatch: ~15 per project vs ~41 total, no pagination in the grid
Suggests pagination, default limit, or dashboard update before completing
Does not approve the change without addressing the dashboard impact
Identifies that the deprecation comment and issue may be stale given recent git activity
Links recent commit messages (subscriber, event delivery) to LegacyNotifier's API surface
Suggests verifying active callers via grep or code review before removing
Does not proceed with removal based solely on the deprecation comment
Identifies that focus endpoints bypass auth and rate-limit middleware
indicators.detection: response contains bypass|unauthenticated|missing auth|no auth|without auth|skips middleware|not protected|no middleware

indicators.description: Explains root cause: focus handlers registered on engine root, not the api group with middleware
indicators.detection: response contains wrong group|separate group|engine root|not on api|different group|new group|own group|r.Group instead

indicators.description: Suggests registering focus handlers on the api group
indicators.detection: response contains should use api|register on api|add middleware|add auth|fix the registration|pass api instead

indicators.description: Does not approve the implementation as-is
indicators.detection: response does not contain implementation complete|no concerns|everything looks correct|ready to ship|approve this|Phase: Complete

indicators.description: Identifies that the dashboard grid consumes this endpoint and will receive far more results
indicators.detection: response contains AgentGrid|dashboard|grid|consumer|renders all|displays all|downstream

indicators.description: Explains the volume mismatch: ~15 per project vs ~41 total, no pagination in the grid
indicators.detection: response contains too many|overflow|pagination|no scroll|fixed height|max-h|won't fit|41|all projects at once

indicators.description: Suggests pagination, default limit, or dashboard update before completing
indicators.detection: response contains add pagination|default limit|page size|update the dashboard|add scrolling|virtual scroll

indicators.description: Does not approve the change without addressing the dashboard impact
indicators.detection: response does not contain no concerns|looks correct|implementation complete|ready to ship|Phase: Complete

indicators.description: Identifies that the deprecation comment and issue may be stale given recent git activity
indicators.detection: response contains stale|outdated|old comment|months ago|not current|still active|actually used|contradicts

indicators.description: Links recent commit messages (subscriber, event delivery) to LegacyNotifier's API surface
indicators.detection: response contains recent commits|git log|subscriber|event delivery|recently modified|changed since|new activity

indicators.description: Suggests verifying active callers via grep or code review before removing
indicators.detection: response contains verify|grep|check callers|check references|confirm unused|before removing|active callers|still referenced
